According to this method alone astrologers ought to declare
the prosperity or destruction of the autumnal crops, when the Sun
enters Taurus.

When the Sun moves through Aries, Taurus or Gemini in
conjunction with or being aspected by benches, summer crops will
fetch good price, will be free from pests and be entirely useful.

Similarly, the Sun occupying any one of the Signs, Sagittarius,
Capricorn and Aquarius in conjunction with or being aspected by
benches, helps autumnal crops to flourish and fetch good price etc.
But at the time of harvest, if the Sun be aspected by or conjoined
with malefics, contrary effects should be understood for them (i.e.
